event_name: 2026 Ultimate Orienteer #3 - Lord Hill Park Score-O
event_notes: Archived event page labels the venue as "Lord Hill Regional Park – South Entrance"; canonical venue resolved to "Lord Hill Regional Park".
event_comments: Archived event page says December's Bog Slog was canceled due to floods, so this score-o combines that rescheduled idea with Ultimate Orienteer #3.
